title: cyperus diluvialis
intro: Cyperus diluvialis, also known as the Flood Sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus diluvialis include reducing fever, treating urinary tract infections, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Cyperus diluvialis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
